ticket_goal: Graceful Error Handling & Global Error Boundary
ticket_description:
### Description
Improve error handling across the application to provide a better user experience when things go wrong. This includes robust client-side error boundaries, consistent server-side error responses, and integrated logging.

### Requirements
- Global Error Boundary: Enhance error.tsx and global-error.tsx with unified UI.
- Client-Side Boundaries: Implement granular boundaries around critical components.
- Server-Side Consistency: Standardize API error responses.
- UI Feedback: Clear, actionable feedback for the user.
- Sentry Integration: Consistent capture of errors.

### Technical Tasks
- Refactor src/app/error.tsx.
- Implement reusable ErrorBoundary component.
- Create standardized API response utility.
- Audit try-catch blocks for Sentry logging.
- Add Playwright tests for error states.

TECHNICAL SPECS.overview: Implement a BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) wizard that allows power users to bypass global rate limits by providing their own API credentials for platforms (YouTube, TikTok, etc.).

dual_auth_architecture.byok_mode: User-provided API credentials stored in local storage or user-controlled secure environments.
dual_auth_architecture.ui_toggle: Toggle switch in Account Settings to enable/disable BYOK mode per platform.

concierge_wizard.step_2: Platform-specific setup instructions (External link to platform developer portal).
concierge_wizard.step_3: Credential Input (Client ID, Client Secret, Redirect URI).
concierge_wizard.step_4: Real-time Validation (Utility to verify credentials against platform endpoints before save).

privacy_and_security.storage: Keys are stored in browser-based storage. Server never persists raw BYOK keys.
privacy_and_security.encryption: If stored in localStorage, must be obfuscated/encrypted with a user-defined vault password or similar strategy.
privacy_and_security.validation: Strict Zod validation of input keys.
privacy_and_security.logging: Business events logged via Sentry, but PII/Keys MUST NOT be logged.

fixes_applied: Implemented BYOK credential validator with Zod validation.
Created Material UI-based ByokWizard for credential input.
Added unit tests for credential validation utility.
Complete UI/UX redesign of ByokWizard using GlassCard and 2-step process.
Integrated external developer portal links (Google Cloud, TikTok).

Gemini CLI.findings: Fetched issue details. Ticket involves global error handling and boundaries. Labeled as bug and roadmap. Requiring discovery session.

TECHNICAL SPECS.advocate_perspective: Focus on 'Humanly' UI feedback. Instead of technical jargon, users should see clear, empathetic messages with a clear 'Retry' or 'Return to Dashboard' action. The design must match the 'Glass Aesthetic' of the dashboard to ensure the error experience doesn't feel jarring.
TECHNICAL SPECS.skeptic_perspective: Security risk: Avoid leaking stack traces or PII in UI error messages. Sentry logging MUST handle sanitized data. If Sentry fails, implement a local fallback log. Edge cases: Need to handle hydration errors gracefully, as Next.js 15+ can be sensitive. Ensure API error responses are uniform and don't expose server internals.
TECHNICAL SPECS.synthesis: Implement a hierarchical error handling strategy: 1) Global Boundary for top-level app crashes, 2) Granular Boundaries for features (e.g., media upload, scheduler), 3) Standardized Error Response Utility for server actions/APIs.

production_readiness.logging: Use Sentry for all client/server errors. Ensure data sanitization middleware exists.
production_readiness.caching: N/A for error boundaries, but ensure stale UI state doesn't persist.
production_readiness.security: Validate all inputs via Zod. Standardize error messages returned to frontend to prevent information disclosure.

TECHNICAL SPECS.dependency_impact: Impacts: src/app/error.tsx, src/app/global-error.tsx, src/lib/api-response.ts (to be created), and all major feature components.
implementation_roadmap: Create src/lib/errors.ts with a standard ErrorResponse class.
Create src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx for granular UI components.
Refactor src/app/error.tsx and global-error.tsx to use the new UI component.
Audit and wrap critical API routes/server actions with standardized error catching.
Create Playwright tests in src/__tests__/e2e/error-handling.spec.ts to verify boundary behavior.
